description: Copy zones. New zones and gridpoints are created by copying all zones within the given range to a new position with position offset by v . If merge is set off , gridpoints on the outer boundaries of the newly created zones are not merged with preexisting gridpoints. The default setting for merge is on . Zones and gridpoints created by copying retain the group assignments of the source zones and gridpoints.
